log: REASONING: Power Word Stun on Githzerai — Armored Tank (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Githzerai — Armored Tank. 7d8+30 necrotic.

→ Githzerai — Armored Tank: CON save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 20] FAIL! 35 necrotic damage. HP: 24/59
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:16+9=25 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (8/59). Going invisible for survival.

→ Githzerai — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
